case_title: JOHN BLUMENTHAL ET AL VS. MITRA MAHDAVI ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JUN-02-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF DECLARATION OF JAMES D. BIERNAT IN SUPPORT OFBEHZAD NASRE TO QUASH, OR ALTERNATIVELY, TO MODIFY DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS TO INTEL CORPORATION (TRANSACTION ID # 57521268) FILED BY DEFENDANT NASRE, BEHZAD

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BEHZAD NASRE NOTICE OF DEFENDANT BEHZAD NASRES MOTION TO STRIKE THE TWO ACCEPTED CCP 998 OFFERS, REMOVE FALSE DOCUMENTS FILED WITH THE CLERK OF THE SUPERIOR COURT, TO REFER THE MATTER TO THE SAN FRANCISCO DISTRICT ATTORNEY AND TO THE CALIFORNIA STATE BAR, AND FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS AGAINST ATTORNEYS YOSEF PERETZ AND SUMY KIM [ CCP 128.5] IS GRANTED IN PART. THE CCP 998 ACCEPTANCES FILED ON JANUARY 11, 2016 ARE STRICKEN. PER DECEMBER 23, 2015 E-MAIL (1) OFFERS MAILED ON DECEMBER 22, 2015 WERE REVOKED AND (2) INTENDED OFFER IS TO BE HAND DELIVERED. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE THAT THE OFFERS ACCEPTED ON JANUARY 11, 2015 WERE NOT THE OFFERS MAILED ON DECEMBER 22, 2015 OF THAT THEY WERE HAND-DELIVERED. HOWEVER, IN LIGHT OF SOME CONFUSION REGARDING THE AMOUNT LISTED IN THE REVOKED DECEMBER 22, 2015 OFFERS; THE TENTATIVE REGARDING ADDITIONAL RELIEF IS UNDER SUBMISSION.** (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR MORE INFORMATION)** JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; REPORTED: ANGELA POURABIB CSR #13714 (415)328-6644. (501)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
James D. Biernat, (650)689-5160 of The Biernat Law Group for Defendant/Moving partyBehzad Nasre.
Yosef Peretz, (415)732-3777 of Peretz & Associates for Plaintif/opposing party John Blumenthal.

Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
DEFENDANT BEHZAD NASRE Notice Of Defendant Behzad Nasres Motion To Strike The Two Accepted Ccp 998 Offers, Remove False Documents Filed With The Clerk Of The Superior Court, To Refer The Matter To The San Francisco District Attorney And To The California State Bar, And For Imposition Of Sanctions Against Attorneys Yosef Peretz And Sumy Kim [ Ccp 128.5] is
GRANTED in part. The CCP 998 acceptances filed on January 11, 2016 are stricken. Per December 23, 2015 e-mail (1) offers mailed on December 22, 2015 were revoked and (2) intended offer is to be hand delivered. Plaintiffs do not provide any evidence that the offers accepted on January 11, 2015 were not the offers mailed on December 22, 2015 of that they were hand-delivered. However, in light of some confusion regarding the amount listed in the revoked December 22, 2015 offers; the tentative regarding additional relief is Under Submission.** Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Angela Pourabib CSR #13714 (415)328-6644 (501)

**2/5/16 Order is signed. RElief requested as to sanctions - Denied.**
